title: senecio tergolanatus
intro: Senecio tergolanatus, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family, native to the western coast of North America. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit medicinal properties, particularly anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its antiseptic properties can aid in wound healing. Traditionally, Groundsel has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to treat various health conditions, with some studies suggesting its potential in reducing inflammation and improving gut health.
